scripts.backend:package: mkdir -p ../.tmp ../.m2repo && cd ../backend && MAVEN_OPTS=-Djava.io.tmpdir=../.tmp TMPDIR=../.tmp mvn -s ../.mvn/public-settings.xml -Dmaven.repo.local=../.m2repo clean -DskipTests package
scripts.tauri:build:app: npm run backend:package && mkdir -p ../.tmp && TAURI_CONFIG="$(node scripts/tauri-config.mjs)" TMPDIR="$PWD/../.tmp" tauri build --bundles app
scripts.tauri:build: npm run backend:package && mkdir -p ../.tmp && TAURI_CONFIG="$(node scripts/tauri-config.mjs)" TMPDIR="$PWD/../.tmp" tauri build
scripts.tauri:build:linux: npm run backend:package && mkdir -p ../.tmp && TAURI_CONFIG="$(node scripts/tauri-config.mjs)" TMPDIR="$PWD/../.tmp" tauri build --bundles appimage
